title: Creating largest or smallest number
description: Sal arranges digits to make the largest or smallest possible number.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Arrange the digits $6,0,1,$ and $2$ to create the greatest possible four-digit number.**

[[☃ sorter 1]]
hints:
We want to put the largest digit in the highest place value. 

Which digit is the largest? 
$\maroonD6$ is the largest digit, and we want to put it in the position with the highest place value.   

  So $\maroonD6$ will be in the thousands place: 
 $\maroonD{6}{,}$ $\_$ $\_$ $\_$
Now we need to do the same thing with the next largest digit:  $\blueD2$.  

  So  $\blueD2$ goes in the hundreds place:  

$\maroonD{6}{,}$$\blueD2$ $\_$ $\_$   
The next largest digit is the $\greenD1$.  The $\greenD1$ goes in the place to the right of hundreds--the tens place:  

$\maroonD{6}{,}$$\blueD2$$\greenD1$  $\_$
The smallest digit is the $\purpleC0$.  The  $\purpleC0$ goes in the ones place:  

$\maroonD{6}{,}\blueD2\greenD1\purpleC0$

The greatest possible number we can make is $\maroonD{6}{,}\blueD2\greenD1\purpleC0$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Arrange the digits $8, 1, 4, 3,$ and $7$  to create the greatest possible five-digit number.**

[[☃ sorter 1]]
hints:
We want to put the largest digit in the highest place value. 

Which digit is the largest?

$\maroonD8$ is the largest digit, and we want to put it in the position with the highest place value.   

  So $\maroonD8$ will be in the ten thousands place: 
 $\maroonD{8}$ $\_{,}$ $\_$ $\_$ $\_$

Now we need to do the same thing with the next largest digit:  $\blueD7$.  

  So  $\blueD7$ goes in the thousands place:  

$\maroonD{8}$$\blueD7{,}$ $\_$ $\_$ $\_$

We can continue placing the next largest digit  in the next largest place value until we have placed all five digits:

$\maroonD{8}$$\blueD7{,}$$431$
The greatest possible number we can make is $87{,}431$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Arrange the digits $2,4,$ and $9$ to create the greatest possible three-digit number.**

[[☃ sorter 1]]
hints:
We want to put the largest digit in the highest place value. 

Which digit is the largest?

$\greenD9$ is the largest digit, and we want to put it in the position with the highest place value.   

  So $\greenD9$ will be in the hundreds place: 
 $\greenD{9}$ $\_$ $\_$

Now we need to do the same thing with the next largest digit:  $\blueD4$.  

  So  $\blueD4$ goes in the tens place:  

$\greenD{9}$$\blueD4$ $\_$

The smallest digit is the $\purpleC2$.  The  $\purpleC2$ goes in the ones place:  

$\greenD{9}\blueD4\purpleC2$

The greatest possible number we can make is $\greenD{9}\blueD4\purpleC2$.

We can continue placing the next largest digit in the next largest place value until we have placed all five digits:
